# Calculate the difference in ForkLength_mm between the years for each IndividualID
size_change_df <- yy %>%
  group_by(IndividualID) %>%
  summarize(ForkLength_diff = ForkLength_mm[EHYear == max(EHYear)] - ForkLength_mm[EHYear == min(EHYear)])

# Create the bar plot
barplot(size_change_df$ForkLength_diff, 
        names.arg = seq_along(size_change_df$ForkLength_diff), 
        #col = ifelse(size_change_df$ForkLength_diff < 0, \red\"
